name_en: Top-tier replica M83048 Black This season's brand-new Nano Alma bag is from the Cruise 2024 series, made of soft lambskin and featuring Malletage quilting, paying tribute to the Louis Vuitton suitcase's cross-stitch lining. The bag interprets the classic Alma in a mini size, with a handle, chain strap, and detachable adjustable leather shoulder strap for different looks. Dimensions: 18 x 12 x 8 cm
